Logitech G

Pro Series

PRO X SUPERLIGHT 2c

DESIGNED WITH PROS. ENGINEERED TO WIN.

Meet the newest challenger in our “champion-winning” line up. Crafted with the world’s top esports athletes.

Description

PRO X SUPERLIGHT 2c is a 1.79 oz(51g) compact mouse featuring advanced HERO 2 sensor, robust LIGHTSPEED wireless, and LIGHTFORCE switches while delivering up to 95 hours of battery life.

Dimensions

Height: 1.51 in (38.5mm)
Width: 2.41 in (61.4mm)
Length: 4.66 in (118.4mm)
Weight: 1.8 oz (51g)

Explore Products

Product Series

PRO X SUPERLIGHT 2c

LIGHTSPEED Wireless Gaming Mouse

Key Features

51g

Ultra-Light Weight

0.7mm Ultra-Thin Base

44K

DPI

HERO 2 Sensor, Zero Smoothing

8K Hz

Report Rate

0.125ms Response

95h

Battery Life

15 Min Fast Charge = 13h Usage

Additional Features

PRECISION PERFECTED

Experience pro-precision with an advanced gaming sensor. Our exclusive HERO 2 sensor optimizes performance and efficiency with sub micron tracking at over 888 IPS, 8 G and up to 44,000 DPI.

Play at LIGHTSPEED

The trusted performance and reliability of LIGHTSPEED wireless at up to 8 kHz polling is at your fingertips. We design our wireless connection for tournament play and test for total reliability even in extreme RF environments beyond the world's biggest LANs. We make consistency critical – you put all your attention on your game.

PRO PERFORMANCE IN A CLICK

LIGHTFORCE switches offer the best of both worlds by combining the speed and reliability of optical switches with the satisfying feel of a traditional microswitch.

PRO GRADE TECH

With the power efficiency of HERO 2, LIGHTSPEED, and LIGHTFORCE, get up to 95 hours of battery life on a single charge. Quickly recharge using USB-C, or POWERPLAY 2 for complete wireless freedom (POWERPLAY 2 sold separately).

About Logitech

About Us

At Logitech, our purpose is to extend human potential in work and play. We do this by designing software-enabled hardware solutions that drive superior performance when gaming and superior productivity while at work, all with maximum comfort, speed and accuracy. We enable creativity when pursuing passions and connectivity so everyone is seen, heard and can contribute in their own unique way.

1981

Year Founded

Founded in Apples, Switzerland

100+

Countries & Regions

Global Business Coverage

7,000+

Global Employees

40+ Years of Industry Experience

Equality & Environment

Open & Ourselves

Hungry & Humble

After-sale Service

We provide you with comprehensive after-sales support

🛡

2-Year Warranty

All Logitech G products come with a 2-year limited hardware warranty. Free repair or replacement for quality issues.

📦

30-Day Return

Within 30 days of purchase, you can return for a refund at any time, no questions asked.

🚚

Free Shipping

Free shipping on official store orders over $29, delivered in 3–5 business days.

💬

Online Support

24/7 online customer support. Contact us via website, email, or social media.

🔧

Repair Service

Nationwide authorized repair centers. Submit a ticket online for fast-response repair service.

📥

Driver Download

Free Logitech G HUB download for custom buttons, lighting, and performance settings.

Contact Us

📧 support@logitech.com 📞 400-XXX-XXXX 🌐 support.logitech.com

Business hours: Monday to Friday 9:00 - 18:00 (excluding holidays)

How you join

At Logitech, we live our values and expect you to show the same to become one of us. Be who you are, come prepared, and we’ll try to make it enjoyable in the process.

Introduce Yourself

Apply for any open listing.

Getting to know us

Meet future colleagues; hiring manager, team members, other leaders, etc.

Joining Logitech

We discuss and extend an offer. You accept. Can’t wait to have you here!
